channel.title: Premium V2 on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Premium V2 on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure API Management Premium v2 now supports multiple custom domains
item.description:
Azure API Management Premium v2 now supports multiple custom domains. This lets organizations use different branded domains for APIs, developer portals, and management endpoints.

  • Source: Azure Updates
